meta.siteDescription: Content production — strategy, video, photography and social media.
meta.homeTitle: Skyrud Media — video, photo and content production
meta.homeDescription: Skyrud Media creates visual content for brands: film, video, photography, strategy and social media. From brief to final export.
meta.portfolioDescription: Browse selected short films, TikTok edits and photography from Skyrud Media — visual content from brief to final export.

hero.description: Visual content for brands that want to communicate clearly, professionally, and with impact.

headline.seo: Content that gets brands noticed, remembered, seen and shared.

services.heading: What we make
services.intro: One team from brief to delivery — film, photography, strategy, and post-production for brands that need to look as sharp as they sound.

video.title: Video
video.summary: Story-led films built for attention — from first brief to final export.

photography.title: Photography
photography.summary: Consistent imagery that strengthens how your brand looks everywhere.
photography.imageAlt: Photographer adjusting a camera in studio

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.summary: Clear direction before the cameras roll — so every asset has a job to do.
strategy.imageAlt: Creative team planning a campaign together

postProduction.title: Post Production
postProduction.summary: Polished finishing that makes the work feel intentional, not assembled.
postProduction.imageAlt: Video editor working at a colour grading workstation

process.heading: From concept to delivery
process.intro: A smooth production process with clear milestones — so you always know what's happening and when your assets land.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We define your audience, message, channels, and production requirements.

production.title: Production
production.description: We plan the shoot, locations, crew, and content schedule.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.description: You receive ready-to-use files for websites, social media, advertising, and presentations.

contact.heading: Let's talk about your project
contact.intro: Share a few details and we'll get back to you with next steps — usually within one business day.

sidebar.emailNote: Prefer email? Send over a brief, timeline, or reference links and we'll pick up the conversation from there.
sidebar.responseTime: Typical response time is within 24 hours on business days.

metadata.title: Privacy policy | {siteName}
metadata.description: How {siteName} collects and uses personal data.

whoWeAre.title: 1. Who we are
whoWeAre.intro: {dataController} operates the {siteName} website and is the data controller for the personal data described in this policy.
whoWeAre.contactIntro: For privacy-related questions or requests, contact us at

whatWeCollect.title: 2. What personal data we collect
whatWeCollect.intro: We only collect personal data that you choose to provide through our contact form. This may include:

items.name: Name
items.details: Project details and any other information you choose to share

whatWeCollect.noTracking: Aside from one language-preference cookie (see section 3), we do not set advertising trackers or other non-essential cookies.

cookies.title: 3. Cookies
cookies.intro: We use one functional cookie to remember your language choice between visits. Vercel Web Analytics and Speed Insights, which we use for visit statistics and performance, do not use cookies.
cookies.localePurpose: Remembers whether you prefer Norwegian or English
cookies.control: You can delete cookies at any time through your browser settings. If you delete NEXT_LOCALE, your language choice will not be remembered on your next visit.

howWeCollect.title: 4. How we collect data
howWeCollect.form: We collect personal data when you submit the contact form on our website. The information is processed so we can receive and respond to your inquiry.
howWeCollect.hosting: Like most websites, our hosting provider may automatically process limited technical information required to deliver the website securely, such as your IP address, browser type, and request logs.
howWeCollect.analytics: We use Vercel Web Analytics and Speed Insights to understand how the website is used and how it performs (for example page views, device type, country, and Core Web Vitals such as load time). These tools do not use cookies or third-party advertising trackers, and data is shown in aggregated form without us identifying individual visitors.

whyWeUse.title: 5. Why we use your data and legal basis
whyWeUse.intro: We use your personal data to:

purposes.followUp: Follow up regarding a potential project or collaboration
purposes.records: Maintain a record of our communication where appropriate

whyWeUse.gdprIntro: Under the UK/EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), we process your personal data on the following legal bases:
whyWeUse.article6b: Article 6(1)(b) — to take steps at your request before entering into a contract, such as responding to project enquiries.
whyWeUse.article6f: Article 6(1)(f) — our legitimate interest in responding to enquiries and managing business communications.

retention.title: 6. How long we keep your data
retention.main: We keep contact form submissions only for as long as necessary to respond to your inquiry and manage any follow-up. If a business relationship develops, we may retain relevant correspondence for administrative, accounting, or legal purposes.
retention.deletion: When personal data is no longer needed, it is deleted or anonymised.

sharing.title: 7. Who we share data with
sharing.intro: We do not sell your personal data. We may share it only with:
sharing.providers: Service providers that help us operate the website, deliver email, or collect aggregated visit and performance statistics (such as hosting, email services, Vercel Web Analytics, or Speed Insights), under data processing agreements where required.
sharing.authorities: Authorities or professional advisers where we are legally required to do so.
sharing.transfers: If personal data is transferred outside the UK or EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, such as Standard Contractual Clauses or an adequacy decision where applicable.

rights.title: 8. Your rights
rights.intro: If you are in the UK or EEA, you have the right to:

items.access: Access the personal data we hold about you
items.correction: Request correction of inaccurate personal data
items.deletion: Request deletion of your personal data in certain circumstances
items.restrict: Restrict or object to certain processing
items.portability: Receive your personal data in a portable format where applicable

rights.exerciseIntro: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at
rights.exerciseOutro: . We will respond within one month, as required by applicable law.
rights.complaintIntro: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority. In Norway, this is

security.title: 9. Security
security.body: We take appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against unauthorised access, loss, misuse, or disclosure. While no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure, we work to protect the information you provide.

changes.title: 10. Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page, and the "Last updated" date will be revised accordingly.
